ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sector */,
  "sector_performance" TEXT /* Historical performance of the sector */,
  "top_companies" TEXT /* A list of top companies in the sector */,
  "sector_index" TEXT /* A stock market index representing the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the industry */,
  "industry_performance" TEXT /* Historical performance of the industry */,
  "top_companies" TEXT /* A list of top companies in the industry */,
  "industry_index" TEXT /* A stock market index representing the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the country */,
  "economic_indicators" TEXT /* Key economic indicators of the country */,
  "stock_market_index" TEXT /* A stock market index representing the country */,
  "regulatory_environment" TEXT /* A description of the regulatory environment for financial markets in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* The user's subscription plan (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The user's payment method */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* The status of the user's payment (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for notifications (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the browser or application used */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the user's session */,
  "pages_viewed" INTEGER /* The number of pages viewed during the session */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* A list of actions taken by the user (e.g., view, download, search) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
